claim: Current pdfp eval floors are 17/21 headings, 13/13 formulas, 4/4 table-page recall/precision, 4/5 table-region precision, 6/6 meaningful figure retention, 3/3 caption pairing, and 1/1 vector-only acknowledgement on local fixtures.
Docling is an MIT-licensed open-source PDF conversion package using layout analysis and table-structure recognition models.
Docling exposes OCR, table structure, and formula-related pipeline options; enabling multiple features increases processing time and OCR requires installed engines.
PyMuPDF4LLM's to_markdown API includes options for OCR, images, headers/footers, page chunks, and table strategy.
Poppler pdftotext converts PDFs to plain text and supports -layout, -bbox, -bbox-layout, and -tsv modes for physical layout or bounding-box output.
pdfminer.six provides command-line tools for PDF text extraction using layout analysis with defaults that order and group text sensibly.
pdfplumber exposes PDF text/object inspection, visual debugging tools, and table extraction APIs.
Camelot documents Stream, Lattice, Network, and Hybrid parsers for deterministic table extraction from PDFs.
tabula-java is the table extraction engine behind Tabula and can be used as a CLI to output CSV, TSV, or JSON from PDFs.
OCRmyPDF adds OCR text layers to scanned PDFs so they can be searched or copied, using Ghostscript and Tesseract as external dependencies.
Marker converts documents to Markdown/JSON/chunks/HTML, supports tables, forms, equations, inline math, images, OCR options, LLM-assisted quality, and detailed JSON block types.
Marker's project metadata declares GPL-3.0-or-later licensing; commercial self-hosting has separate licensing notes in the README.

MinerU advertises Markdown/JSON extraction for PDFs and other formats, formulas to LaTeX, tables to HTML, scanned document handling, 109-language OCR, complex layout support, and local/API deployment options.
Adobe PDF Extract API provides cloud JSON and Markdown outputs and extracts contextual text blocks, complex tables, and figures from native or scanned PDFs.
Mathpix v3/pdf processes PDFs asynchronously and outputs MMD, MD, HTML, LaTeX zip, DOCX, PPTX, PDF variants, ZIPs with embedded images, and has an advanced table fallback option.
LlamaParse is an agentic OCR/parsing service for 130+ formats that turns PDFs and scans into LLM-ready text.
Unstructured's API can extract image/table block visual representations and recommends on-demand jobs for production use over the legacy partition endpoint.
